Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Hm, I dunno about the net café... Why don't we go someplace else?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Wait, let me see how much money I have...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Oh no! Where's my wallet!? Did I drop it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}But, when? I had it when I pulled out my train pass...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Wait... Someone bumped into me outside the station![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Sorry, I'm gonna go back there and look around. It'll just take a minute![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Make sure you wait right here, okay?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I'll be fine, so don't come after me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Stay right there, you got it!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari vehemently warned me and ran off...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What should I do?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm starting to get weird looks...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like she's coming back...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Did something happen...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to go check up on her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}More and more people are staring...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari still hasn't come back.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should check up on her.[n]{f 1 1}
